hero.name: Juan Gómez
hero.title: Senior Software Engineer
hero.description: 15+ years of experience modernizing legacy systems and building scalable fullstack solutions. Expert in .NET, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Angular, Node.js, AWS, and Azure.

about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Get to know me better
about.bio: Senior Software Engineer with 15+ years of experience modernizing legacy systems and building scalable fullstack solutions in multinational settings. Proven leader delivering high-availability (>99.9%) and performance gains (+35%) in critical projects. Skilled in agile, CI/CD, and team leadership.

expertise.frontend: Modern web applications with React, Next.js, TypeScript, and Angular. Expertise in building responsive, accessible, and performant user interfaces.
expertise.backend: Scalable server-side solutions with .NET, Node.js, and SQL databases. Experience with RESTful APIs, microservices, and data processing.
expertise.cloud: Cloud infrastructure on AWS and Azure. Proficient in Docker, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps practices for high-availability systems.

jobs.description: Leading the modernization of legacy systems to cloud-native architectures. Achieved 35% performance improvement and 99.9% uptime in critical applications.
achievements: Migrated monolithic .NET applications to microservices architecture on AWS
Implemented CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 60%
Led a team of 8 developers in agile methodology
Modernized frontend with React and Next.js, improving user experience

jobs.description: Developed and maintained critical banking applications serving millions of users. Focused on security, performance, and reliability.
achievements: Built RESTful APIs handling 10M+ daily transactions
Implemented security best practices (OAuth2, JWT, encryption)
Reduced page load time by 45% through optimization
Mentored junior developers and conducted code reviews

jobs.description: Full-stack development of enterprise web applications. Worked on various projects across different industries including e-commerce, healthcare, and logistics.
achievements: Developed e-commerce platform processing $2M+ in annual revenue
Created automated testing suite improving code quality
Integrated payment gateways and third-party APIs
Collaborated with UX designers to improve user interfaces

jobs.description: Started my career building websites and small applications for local businesses. Gained foundational knowledge in software development and best practices.
achievements: Delivered 20+ website projects for SMB clients
Learned version control and team collaboration
Rapidly acquired new skills in multiple technologies
